title: physaria parviflora
intro: Physaria parviflora, also known as small-flowered phacelia or small-flowered cordplant, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Physaria parviflora include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Physaria parviflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
